name: Bioluminescent
description: Deep ocean aesthetic. Organic glow. Luminescent edges on dark backgrounds, living and breathing UI. Glowing borders, pulsing animations, deep abyss backgrounds.
personality: pill + glow elevation + smooth motion + no borders + vivid gradients

decorators.bio-glow-card: Dark card with luminescent cyan border glow at 40% opacity, subtle pulse animation on the border shadow.
decorators.bio-glow-ring: Circular element with animated bioluminescent ring that slowly pulses between cyan and violet hues.
decorators.bio-abyss: Deep near-black background with faint radial cyan glow emanating from center for depth effect.
decorators.bio-tendril: Organic wavy border accent using SVG path with glowing cyan stroke and animated dash offset.

bio-glow-card.description: Dark card with luminescent cyan border glow at 40% opacity, subtle pulse animation on the border shadow.
bio-glow-card.intent: Use for content containers that should feel alive and organic. The pulsing glow border mimics deep-sea bioluminescence.

bio-glow-ring.description: Circular element with animated bioluminescent ring that slowly pulses between cyan and violet hues.
bio-glow-ring.intent: Use for avatar frames, status indicators, and circular elements that need the living bioluminescent effect.

bio-abyss.description: Deep near-black background with faint radial cyan glow emanating from center for depth effect.
bio-abyss.intent: Use as the foundational page background to create the deep ocean abyss atmosphere. The central glow suggests light from an unseen source.

bio-tendril.description: Organic wavy border accent using SVG path with glowing cyan stroke and animated dash offset.
bio-tendril.intent: Use as decorative section borders or dividers. The animated organic wave creates a living, breathing separation between content.
